system.description:
Even without navigation gear you have an instinctive knack for directions and safe routes of travel.

Level 1: Gain Survive as a bonus skill. You always know what direction you’re facing. Groups you lead cannot Go Astray, and gain bonus movement equal to two hours of travel without actually taking that time.

Level 2: Scouting a hex takes half the ordinary time. You’re so good at choosing routes and muffling noise that your group is not considered Exposed even if you follow a road or drive a vehicle.
